## We use technology to protect platform integrity, but we don't fact-check reviews

While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. Read more

To protect platform integrity, every review on our platform—verified or not—is screened by our 24/7 automated software. This technology is designed to identify and remove content that breaches our guidelines, including reviews that are not based on a genuine experience. We recognise we may not catch everything, and you can flag anything you think we may have missed. Read more

## Review summary

Based on reviews, created with AI

Most reviewers were unhappy with their experience overall. Many people were dissatisfied with the customer service, finding it unhelpful and difficult to reach a real person. They also encountered issues with orders, such as missed deliveries, items not arriving as expected, or receiving incorrect products. The subscription model was a major source of frustration, with many customers reporting issues with subscription sign-up, difficulty canceling, and problems with renewals. Some people were dissatisfied with the product itself, noting that certain items had no effect, arrived near expiration, or had an unpleasant taste. Conversely, a small portion of people were satisfied with the products, praising their freshness, lack of aftertaste, and the transparency of ingredients. These customers also appreciated the flexibility offered for pausing or rescheduling subscriptions.See more

results.title: Ritual reviewed by Kari Litteer on 8/26/2020
results.text:
Ritual reviewed by Kari Litteer on 8/26/2020

---

Aug 26, 2020

## Never Going Back

Before I signed up with Ritual, I was always trying to find the best deal for three different vitamins at the grocery store. I took B12, iron, and Vitamin D and usually paid about $60/month but was never satisfied with the different products I was finding and trying. Then a friend told me about Ritual and it changed my world. I don't have to worry about price comparing, I'm paying half the amount I was before, and the vitamin I'm taking has everything I need and more. And now, my fiance can't wait to use up his current vitamins so I can add him on my subscription since they offer men's vitamins! Every time I've had issues, the customer service has been impeccable (there were a few months were I was shorted one vitamin). Highly recommend.

August 26, 2020

Unprompted review

## We gebruiken technologie om de integriteit van het platform te beschermen, maar we doen geen factchecks van reviews

We verifiëren geen specifieke claims omdat reviewers hun eigen mening mogen geven. We kunnen reviews echter wel als 'Geverifieerd' bestempelen als we bevestiging hebben dat er een zakelijke interactie heeft plaatsgevonden. Meer informatie

Om de integriteit van het platform te beschermen, wordt elke review op ons platform – al dan niet geverifieerd – gescreend door onze geautomatiseerde software. Deze software kan inhoud identificeren en verwijderen die in strijd is met onze richtlijnen, inclusief reviews die niet zijn gebaseerd op een echte ervaring. We zijn ons ervan bewust dat we weleens wat over het hoofd zien, dus je kunt altijd reviews rapporteren waarvan je denkt dat we ze hebben gemist Meer informatie

Ritual is a personal health brand that is building the future of daily essentials. Our mission is simple: we help turn healthy habits into a Ritual. We started by creating the first visible supply chain of its kind and reinventing the daily multivitamin from the ground up. Now, together with some of the world's leading scientists, researchers, and advisors, we're developing a new standard of high-quality, traceable daily products across new categories.Toon meer

results.title: Ritual beoordeeld door Rav op 2/4/2026
results.text:
Ritual beoordeeld door Rav op 2/4/2026

Review over Ritual

---

4 feb 2026

## Scam-adjacent behavior, customer service is horrendous- stay away

They shipped me supplements that expire in roughly 40 days with absolutely no disclosure. Like a normal customer, I was finishing my previous bottle and didn’t open this one for about a week. By the time I did, the remaining shelf life was so short that the product was effectively useless- I threw the entire bottle in the trash.Customer service made it worse. I dealt with a rep named Fiann, who could not give a straight answer about something incredibly basic: what timeframe they expect customers to actually use the product. The responses were vague, evasive, and showed zero willingness to think from a customer’s perspective. Somehow, the customer is expected to unpack and start consuming supplements immediately for this to “make sense.”This is not a mistake, it’s a business practice. Sending near-expired products and then hiding behind ambiguity is unacceptable. I’m disputing the charge with my bank and will never order from this company again.

30 augustus 2025

Review zonder uitnodiging

Antwoord van Ritual

4 feb 2026

Hi there. We’re really sorry to hear about this experience, and we appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback. We understand how frustrating it can feel to receive a product with a shorter remaining shelf life than expected, especially when you’re planning to finish a current bottle first.Our supplements are safe and effective to use through the expiration date listed on the bottle, and we aim to ship products with sufficient shelf life for regular daily use. That said, we hear your concerns around expectations and transparency, and we’re sorry that our communication didn’t provide the clarity you were looking for. That’s not the experience we want anyone to have.We take feedback like this seriously and will be sharing it with our team as we continue reviewing how we communicate expiration timelines and support customers in these situations. If you’re open to it, we’d appreciate the opportunity to look into your specific order and see how we can help. You can reach us directly at my@ritual.com.

are you human?
